testimonials.quote: Can I give Laser Gator a 6 out of 5 Stars? Wow, I can't say enough about this laser company! We hired them for a couple shows in the past and each time the crowds were blown away by the show's lighting. Professional, friendly, great communication and highest quality stage lighting effects imaginable! Don't think about it, just hire them for your next show or event. You'll thank me later! ;)
testimonials.author: Marco Lago
testimonials.role: Hysteria (Def Leppard Tribute), Dr Crue (Motley Crue Tribute), Nothing's Shocking (Jane's Addiction Tribute), Rock Shop (80's Hair Rock Tribute)

testimonials.quote: It's hard to overstate how much we appreciate working with Milo and Paul of LazerGators and the great heights to which they take our shows. We're regularly getting feedback from our fans that their laser light show is second to none, and created a fabulous, multi-sensory experience. Plus, Milo and Paul are such lovely, fun people to work with and they get our music into their bones, which enables their lasers to be an additional instrument in the band. We've kinda gotten to the place where we don't want to play a show without them!
testimonials.author: The Rush Collective

testimonials.quote: LaserGator brought an energy to our show that the audience is still talking about. Truly world-class production.
testimonials.author: Lance McKay

testimonials.quote: Laser Gator provided lasers for Heart By Heart at the Historic Everett Theatre November 19, 2021. Paul and Milo were professional and courteous to work with, their setup was done unobtrusively and was perfectly dialed in to work with the theater's stage and sight lines. They applied their artistry to custom-designed laser effects and images especially for our songs. This really upped the quality of the overall production, and made our show presentation a cut above the norm. Visual enhancement without taking anything away from the band on stage or the music. Our audience was really impressed! Heart By Heart looks forward to working with Laser Gator again in the future!
testimonials.author: Lizzy Daymont
testimonials.role: Guitars / Keyboards / Vocals, Heart By Heart
